name: Steel Dynamics, Inc.
description: Steel Dynamics, Inc. is one of the largest domestic steel producers and metals recyclers in the United States, based in Fort Wayne, Indiana. The company operates through three primary segments: Steel Operations, Metals Recycling Operations, and Steel Fabrication Operations. It produces a diverse range of steel products, including hot-rolled, cold-rolled, and coated sheet steel, structural steel beams, and rail. As a leader in the electric arc furnace (EAF) steelmaking process, Steel Dynamics focuses on sustainable practices and high-quality manufacturing to serve various industries such as construction, automotive, and energy.
